segments.caption: The video opens with a dark screen, then transitions to a close-up of a muscular man performing a dynamic movement, with the 'FOCUS T25' logo prominently displayed in the background. The scene shifts to a title card introducing 'AB INTERVALS' with 'EQUIPMENT NEEDED: miniMAT' listed, followed by a glowing 'FOCUS T25 ALPHA' logo. The workout begins in a well-lit studio with a large 'FOCUS T25' backdrop in bold yellow and black. The instructor, wearing a teal sleeveless 'T25' shirt and black shorts, leads a group of four participants—two men and two women—on blue exercise mats. The group starts with a warm-up, transitioning into 'CHILD'S POSE + PLANK,' as indicated by the on-screen timer counting down from 25:00. The instructor demonstrates the movement, moving from a kneeling position to a plank, while the participants follow. The camera alternates between wide shots showing the group and close-ups of the instructor’s form. The timer updates to 24:56, then 24:54, as the group holds the plank. The next exercise, 'DOWN DOG + PLANK,' is previewed with a 'UP NEXT' graphic, and the group transitions into the downward dog position, maintaining alignment and core engagement. The instructor continues to lead with clear, energetic cues, and the participants follow in unison, demonstrating focus and coordination. The studio environment features wooden flooring, modern lighting, and fitness equipment in the background, creating a professional and motivating atmosphere.

segments.caption: The video segment opens with the Participants performing a 'DOWN DOG + PLANK' exercise on their Blue Exercise Mats, maintaining a straight line from head to heels under the guidance of the Instructor. The On-Screen Timer counts down from 24:25, and the Exercise Text Overlay confirms the current movement. The Instructor, wearing his teal 'T25' shirt and headset microphone, moves dynamically among the Participants, offering hands-on corrections and encouragement. He crouches beside a female Participant, placing his hands on her lower back to adjust her posture, ensuring proper alignment. As the timer reaches 24:02, the Exercise Text Overlay updates to 'UP NEXT: DOWN DOG + SPIDER LUNGE', signaling the transition. The Participants smoothly shift into the new movement, bringing one knee toward the opposite elbow in a controlled spider lunge motion. The Instructor continues to provide real-time feedback, gesturing with his hands and verbally cueing form. The FOCUS T25 Backdrop remains prominently lit in bold yellow and black, reinforcing the branded workout environment. The wooden floor and studio lighting remain consistent, creating a focused, high-energy atmosphere. The Participants maintain synchronized movements, demonstrating endurance and focus as the timer continues its descent toward 23:30.

segments.caption: The video segment opens with the Instructor actively guiding the Participants through a high-intensity workout in a brightly lit studio. The Participants, positioned on Blue Exercise Mats, begin in a 'DOWN DOG + SPIDER LUNGE' position, with the Instructor crouched beside a blonde female participant, placing his hand on her back to correct her form. The On-Screen Timer counts down from 23:28, and the Exercise Text Overlay confirms the current movement. As the sequence progresses, the group transitions into 'DOWN DOG + OBLIQUE KNEE', with the Instructor continuing to provide hands-on adjustments, emphasizing core engagement. The Participants maintain synchronized movements, their athletic wear—black sports bras, leggings, and shorts—highlighting their focused effort. The FOCUS T25 Backdrop remains a dominant visual element, glowing in yellow and black. The group then moves into a 'LOW PLANK HOLD (L)', holding the position with elbows bent and bodies straight, while the timer ticks down to 22:50. The Instructor demonstrates proper form, maintaining eye contact with the camera. Next, they transition into a 'SIDE PLANK HOLD (L)', with the Instructor and Participants balancing on one forearm and the side of their foot, stacking hips and shoulders. The Instructor gestures to ensure alignment, and the Exercise Text Overlay updates to reflect the new movement. The atmosphere remains intense and focused, with consistent lighting and the studio’s wooden floor providing a clean, professional backdrop. The On-Screen Timer continues its countdown, now at 22:35, as the group holds the side plank with determination.

segments.caption: The video segment opens with the Instructor and Participants performing a 'V' Sit + Arms Down exercise, lying on their backs on Blue Exercise Mats with legs extended upward and arms reaching toward the feet, maintaining core engagement. The On-Screen Timer counts down from 22:29 to 22:12, while the Exercise Text Overlay updates to indicate the next move: 'SIDE HIP-UP (L)'. The group transitions smoothly into Side Hip-Ups on the left side, balancing on one forearm and the side of the foot, lifting the hips while keeping the body in a straight line. The Instructor actively demonstrates and corrects form, placing his hand on a participant’s back to ensure proper alignment. The FOCUS T25 Backdrop remains prominently lit in the background, reinforcing the brand identity. As the timer reaches 21:56, the overlay shifts to 'LOW PLANK PULSE (R)', and the group moves into a low plank position on their forearms, pulsing their hips slightly up and down. The camera pans across the participants, capturing their synchronized movements and focused expressions. The next transition, indicated at 21:35, is to 'SIDE PLANK HOLD (R)', where the group shifts to a side plank on the right side, supporting themselves on the right forearm and right foot, with the left hand resting on the hip. The Instructor continues to lead with precision, maintaining eye contact with the camera and participants, ensuring correct posture. The lighting remains consistent, highlighting the wooden floor and the vibrant blue mats beneath each participant. The On-Screen Timer continues its countdown, and the Exercise Text Overlay updates dynamically to reflect each new movement, guiding the workout flow seamlessly.

segments.caption: The video segment opens with participants performing a Side Plank Hold (R) on blue exercise mats, maintaining a steady, focused posture with their bodies aligned and one hand placed on the hip for stability. The Instructor, wearing a teal 'T25' sleeveless shirt and black shorts, is visible in the background, observing and guiding the group. The On-Screen Timer counts down from 21:26, and the Exercise Text Overlay confirms the current movement. As the timer reaches 21:18, the group transitions into a 'V' Sit + Arms Up, lifting their legs and arms simultaneously into a V-shape while keeping their cores engaged. The Instructor demonstrates the movement with precision, and the Participants follow in unison, their expressions showing concentration. The backdrop remains the prominent FOCUS T25 logo, illuminated in bold yellow and black. At 21:02, the Exercise Text Overlay previews the next move: Side Hip-Up (R). The group then shifts into Side Hip-Up (R), lying on their sides with one hand supporting the body and the other on the hip, lifting the hips upward. The Instructor continues to lead, occasionally placing a hand on a participant’s back to correct form. The timer continues its descent, reaching 20:38 as the group transitions into Alt. Speed Knee Slow, standing up and performing alternating knee lifts with controlled, slow movements. The Instructor leads the motion, stepping forward and back with deliberate pace, while the Participants mirror his movements. The blue mats remain clearly visible beneath each participant, and the studio lighting remains consistent, highlighting the dynamic energy of the workout. The On-Screen Timer updates to 20:28 as the group maintains synchronized, rhythmic motion, demonstrating endurance and focus throughout the sequence.

segments.caption: The video segment opens with the Participants lying on their backs on Blue Exercise Mats, performing 'ALT. STRAIGHT LEG LIFT' as indicated by the Exercise Text Overlay, with the On-Screen Timer counting down from 19:30. The Instructor, wearing a teal sleeveless 'T25' shirt and black shorts, leads the group, demonstrating precise form with his legs extended and hands behind his head. The FOCUS T25 Backdrop remains prominently illuminated in the background, reinforcing the branded workout environment. As the exercise progresses, the text overlay updates to 'UP NEXT: SAME ARM + SAME LEG (R)', signaling the transition. The Participants continue the alternating leg lifts with controlled movements, maintaining synchronization. The Instructor then moves closer to a female Participant, placing his hands on her lower back and hip to correct her alignment, emphasizing core engagement. He gestures with his hands to guide her form, ensuring proper technique. The camera captures close-ups of the correction, highlighting the Instructor’s focused expression and the Participant’s effort. The exercise transitions to 'SAME ARM + SAME LEG (R)', with the Participants lifting their right arms and right legs simultaneously. The Instructor continues to provide hands-on guidance, moving between participants to ensure correct form. The On-Screen Timer continues its countdown, now at 18:50, while the Exercise Text Overlay updates to 'SAME ARM + SAME LEG (L)', indicating the next phase. The Participants switch to lifting their left arms and left legs, maintaining rhythm and focus. The Instructor remains actively engaged, offering verbal cues and physical adjustments, particularly to the female Participant, who smiles slightly during the correction. The lighting remains consistent, with bright studio illumination highlighting the participants' movements and the vibrant yellow FOCUS T25 logo in the background. The atmosphere is energetic and disciplined, with all Participants demonstrating endurance and concentration throughout the sequence.

segments.caption: The video segment begins with the Participants performing the 'SAME ARM + SAME LEG (L)' exercise, lying on their backs on Blue Exercise Mats, extending one arm and the opposite leg while keeping the other arm and leg bent. The Instructor, positioned nearby, observes and provides form corrections, placing his hand on a female participant’s lower back to ensure proper alignment. The On-Screen Timer counts down from 18:28 to 17:53, while the Exercise Text Overlay updates to 'BOTH ARMS + BOTH LEGS' and then 'T SHUFFLE'. As the exercise transitions, the Participants shift to lifting both arms and legs simultaneously, maintaining core engagement. The Instructor actively guides them, gesturing with his hands and offering verbal cues. The scene then shifts to the 'T SHUFFLE', where the Participants rise from their mats and begin a dynamic side-to-side shuffle, mimicking a 'T' shape with their arms extended. The Instructor leads the movement at the front, demonstrating the shuffle with high energy and precision. The FOCUS T25 Backdrop remains prominently lit in the background, reinforcing the brand identity. The lighting is consistent, with warm studio illumination highlighting the participants’ movements and the vibrant yellow logo. The atmosphere is intense and focused, with all Participants maintaining synchronized, controlled motions throughout the transitions.

segments.caption: The workout segment begins with the Instructor, seated on his blue mat, leading the Participants through the 'ALT. HEEL TAP SLOW' exercise, with the On-Screen Timer showing 13:32. He demonstrates controlled, alternating heel taps while seated with legs extended, hands placed on his hips to emphasize core engagement. The Participants, two men and two women, follow in unison, maintaining synchronized movements and focused expressions. The Exercise Text Overlay updates to 'DUAL HEEL TAP SLOW' as the Instructor transitions into the next movement, now tapping both heels simultaneously. The camera pans slightly to show the group from different angles, highlighting their form and the FOCUS T25 Backdrop glowing brightly in the background. As the timer counts down to 12:58, the Instructor cues the next exercise, 'DUAL STRAIGHT LEG LIFT', and assists a female Participant by gently guiding her legs upward, demonstrating proper technique. The Participants shift into the new movement, lifting both legs straight up while keeping their upper bodies stable. The Instructor, in his teal 'T25' shirt and headset, leads with dynamic movements, transitioning from wide plank positions to narrow, then back out, while the Participants follow closely, showing visible exertion. The On-Screen Timer counts down from 01:29 to 00:50, with the Exercise Text Overlay confirming the current movement. As the timer reaches 00:50, the overlay updates to 'UP NEXT: HIGH KNEE JOG', signaling a transition. The group then shifts into a high-knee jog, moving in place with arms pumping and knees lifting high. The Instructor continues to lead energetically, maintaining form and pace, while the Participants keep up, some with visible sweat and focused expressions. The FOCUS T25 Backdrop remains prominently lit in yellow and black, anchoring the scene. The camera pans slightly to capture the group’s synchronized motion, emphasizing the intensity and rhythm of the workout. The On-Screen Timer continues to count down from 00:49 to 00:32 as the high-knee jog progresses, with the group maintaining energy and coordination throughout.

segments.caption: The video segment begins with the Instructor and Participants performing a 'HIGH KNEE JOG' on their blue exercise mats, maintaining synchronized, high-energy movements in front of the prominent FOCUS T25 backdrop. The On-Screen Timer counts down from 00:32 to 00:00, while the Exercise Text Overlay updates to 'SLOW CONTROL JOG' and then transitions to 'AB INTERVALS TIME' as the exercise concludes. The Instructor, still in his teal 'T25' shirt, gestures and speaks to the group, signaling the end of the jog. The Participants transition into a relaxed stance, some clapping and smiling, indicating the completion of the set. The scene then shifts to a cooldown phase, with the Instructor now wearing a black sleeveless 'T25' shirt, leading a stretching routine. The On-Screen Timer changes to 'COOLDOWN' with 03:29 remaining, and the Exercise Text Overlay updates accordingly. The lighting remains consistent, with the FOCUS T25 logo brightly illuminated, and the environment retains its clean, modern studio aesthetic. The Instructor demonstrates arm stretches, and the Participants follow, though they are no longer visible in the frame during the cooldown segment.

segments.caption: The video transitions into the cooldown phase of the FOCUS T25 workout, with the Instructor now wearing a black sleeveless 'T25' shirt, black shorts with white stripes, and dark sneakers, demonstrating a series of dynamic stretches. He begins with arm circles and overhead stretches, moving fluidly from side to side, then transitions into a deep forward bend, reaching toward his toes with hands placed on the floor. His movements are deliberate and controlled, emphasizing flexibility and recovery. The On-Screen Timer in the bottom left corner displays 'COOLDOWN' with a countdown from 03:22 to 02:18, accompanied by a yellow progress bar. The FOCUS T25 Backdrop remains prominently illuminated in the background, anchoring the studio setting. The environment is quiet and focused, with no other participants visible, highlighting the Instructor’s solo cooldown routine. The lighting remains consistent, casting a soft glow on the wooden floor and the Instructor’s form, emphasizing the calm, reflective atmosphere of the cooldown segment.

segments.caption: The video segment captures the Instructor performing a structured cooldown routine in a well-lit studio. He begins with a forward fold, placing his hands on the floor and gently rocking side to side, stretching his hamstrings and lower back. His black sleeveless 'T25' shirt and black shorts with white stripes are clearly visible, along with dark sneakers and black wristbands. As the On-Screen Timer counts down from 02:17 to 01:23, he transitions into a standing forward bend, interlacing his fingers behind his back and lifting his arms overhead to deepen the stretch. He then moves into a dynamic lunge stretch, stepping forward with one leg while keeping the back leg straight and hands on the front thigh, alternating sides. The FOCUS T25 Backdrop remains prominently displayed in the background, illuminated in bold yellow and black, anchoring the scene. The wooden floor and studio lighting remain consistent, emphasizing the focused, controlled nature of the cooldown. No other participants or mats are visible, indicating a solo demonstration phase.

segments.caption: The video segment captures the Instructor performing a dynamic cooldown sequence in a spacious, well-lit studio with wooden flooring. He begins with a deep lunge stretch, placing his hands on his front knee, then transitions into a low lunge with hands reaching toward the floor, followed by a fluid movement into a plank position. He then performs a dynamic movement by stepping his front foot forward and rising into a standing position, repeating the sequence on the opposite side. Throughout, he maintains a focused expression, demonstrating controlled, deliberate motions. The FOCUS T25 Backdrop remains prominently illuminated behind him, anchoring the scene. The On-Screen Timer counts down from 01:22 to 00:20, indicating the progression of the cooldown phase. The Instructor concludes the sequence with a full-body stretch, raising his arms overhead and then lowering them to his sides, signaling the end of the cooldown. The environment remains consistent with no visible changes in lighting or setting, and no other participants are present during this segment.

segments.caption: The video segment captures the final cooldown phase of a FOCUS T25 workout session. The Instructor, a muscular man in a black sleeveless 'T25' shirt, black shorts with white stripes, and dark sneakers, leads the cooldown with deliberate, controlled movements. He begins by raising his arms overhead, then transitions into a forward fold, reaching toward his toes with his hands, maintaining a straight back and engaged core. The camera alternates between close-up and wide-angle shots, emphasizing his form and the spacious studio environment. The On-Screen Timer counts down from 00:17 to 00:00, displaying 'COOLDOWN' with a yellow progress bar. As the timer reaches zero, the Instructor stands upright, claps his hands together, and smiles, signaling the end of the session. The FOCUS T25 Backdrop remains prominently illuminated in the background, reinforcing the brand identity. The studio features wooden flooring, modern lighting, and minimalistic decor, including a shelving unit with workout gear and a white bench. The atmosphere is calm and focused, reflecting the transition from intense exercise to recovery. No Participants are visible during this cooldown segment, and the Blue Exercise Mats are not in use.
